stemHtml:
Refer to figure.
The annex shows a Regulated Take-Off Weight (RTOW) table for runway 23L from take-off position VB. Use the data below and determine the appropriate assumed/FLEX temperature and V1, VR, and V2 speeds. For this question do NOT interpolate. Choose the most conservative figures at all times.

W/V: 230°/16 kt
OAT: +10°C
QNH: 1008 hPa
Engine anti-ice: OFF
Packs: OFF
Take-off mass: 71 840 kg
Quick line up

options.a: 57°C and V1 139 kt, VR 139 kt, and V2 145 kt
options.b: 59°C and V1 138 kt, VR 138 kt, and V2 144 kt
options.c: 53°C and V1 138 kt, VR 138 kt, and V2 143 kt
options.d: 63°C and V1 140 kt, VR 140 kt, and V2 146 kt
